case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. WHEELS LT et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT WHEELS LT INGERSOLL RAND AUTOS DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-14-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-09-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-29-2010
